verses.text: 'Ho, every one that thirsteth, come ye to the waters,' and buy wine and milk 'without money and without price.' Grace is free. God invites the empty and poor to a feast that costs them nothing and satisfies the soul.

'Ho, every one that thirsteth, come ye to the waters,' and buy wine and milk 'without money and without price.' Grace is free. God invites the empty and poor to a feast that costs them nothing and satisfies the soul.

'Incline your ear, and come unto me... I will make an everlasting covenant... the sure mercies of David.' He offers lasting life. The covenant promises of David are fulfilled and secured in Christ for all who come.

'Incline your ear, and come unto me... I will make an everlasting covenant... the sure mercies of David.' He offers lasting life. The covenant promises of David are fulfilled and secured in Christ for all who come.

'Incline your ear, and come unto me... I will make an everlasting covenant... the sure mercies of David.' He offers lasting life. The covenant promises of David are fulfilled and secured in Christ for all who come.

'Seek ye the LORD while he may be found'; let the wicked forsake his way and turn, 'and he will abundantly pardon.' Now is the time. God's pardon is rich and full for everyone who repents and returns.

'Seek ye the LORD while he may be found'; let the wicked forsake his way and turn, 'and he will abundantly pardon.' Now is the time. God's pardon is rich and full for everyone who repents and returns.

'My thoughts are not your thoughts'; as the heavens are higher than the earth, so are His ways higher than ours. His mercy exceeds our reckoning. God pardons more freely and wisely than we can imagine.

'My thoughts are not your thoughts'; as the heavens are higher than the earth, so are His ways higher than ours. His mercy exceeds our reckoning. God pardons more freely and wisely than we can imagine.
As rain waters the earth and gives seed and bread, so God's word 'shall not return unto me void,' but accomplish His pleasure. His word is fruitful. What God speaks will surely do its appointed work.
As rain waters the earth and gives seed and bread, so God's word 'shall not return unto me void,' but accomplish His pleasure. His word is fruitful. What God speaks will surely do its appointed work.

'Ye shall go out with joy,' the mountains singing, thorns replaced by fir and myrtle, for an everlasting sign. Redemption brings rejoicing. The whole creation shares the gladness of God's saved people.

'Ye shall go out with joy,' the mountains singing, thorns replaced by fir and myrtle, for an everlasting sign. Redemption brings rejoicing. The whole creation shares the gladness of God's saved people.
